description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and deploy, using variables for Docker images (LINUX_64_IMAGE, LINUX_AARCH_IMAGE) and build scripts. In the build stage add the following jobs: build_doc (image agrumery/ubuntu_py310) runs `bash $BUILD_DOC`; linux_aarch64_nightly_wheel_py310, linux_aarch64_wheel_py310, linux_aarch64_wheel_py310_sabi_off (image $LINUX_AARCH_IMAGE) run `bash $LINUX_NIGHTLY_WHEELHOUSE cp310-cp310`, `bash $LINUX_WHEELHOUSE cp310-cp310`, and `bash $LINUX_WHEELHOUSE cp310-cp310 --stable_abi_off` respectively; linux_agrum_aarch64 and linux_agrum_x86_64 (images $LINUX_AARCH_IMAGE and $LINUX_64_IMAGE) run `bash $LINUX_BUILD aGrUM cp310-cp310`; linux_pyagrum_aarch64_py310, linux_pyagrum_aarch64_py314, linux_pyagrum_x86_64_py310, linux_pyagrum_x86_64_py314 run `bash $LINUX_BUILD pyAgrum` with the appropriate CPython version tags; linux_x86_64_nightly_wheel_py310, linux_x86_64_wheel_py310, linux_x86_64_wheel_py310_sabi_off (image $LINUX_64_IMAGE) run analogous wheelhouse scripts; macos_agrum, macos_arm_agrum, macos_pyagrum_py310, macos_pyagrum_py314, macos_arm_pyagrum_py310, macos_arm_pyagrum_py314 (image agrumery/ubuntu) run `bash $OSX_BUILD` or `bash $OSX_ARM_BUILD` with PYTHON_VERSION and TARGET variables; osx_arm_wheel_py310 and osx_wheel_py310 run `bash $OSX_WHEELHOUSE py310`; windows_agrum_2019, windows_agrum_2022, windows_pyagrum_2022_py310, windows_pyagrum_2022_py314, windows_pyagrum_mingw_py314 run a PowerShell command `powershell -File $WINDOWS_BUILD -CI_JOB_ID $CI_JOB_ID -CI_PROJECT_DIR $CI_PROJECT_DIR -CONDA_ENV $CONDA_ENV -TARGET $TARGET -COMPILER $COMPILER`; windows_wheel_py310 runs `powershell -File $WINDOWS_WHEELHOUSE -CI_JOB_ID $CI_JOB_ID -CI_PROJECT_DIR $CI_PROJECT_DIR -CONDA_ENV $CONDA_ENV`. All build jobs use the shared artifact definition (expire 1 week, name ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, paths wheels/*.whl) and appropriate caches, and are triggered on tags, the master branch, web or merge‑request events (or always for generic build templates). The deploy stage contains a linux_build job (image agrumery/ubuntu) that caches the build directory, installs curl, and triggers a downstream pipeline via a curl POST to the GitLab API with variables to deploy to PyPI and publish documentation.
